Atlanta Bread | Main Menu | Sandwiches, Salads, Soups and Coffee        Atlanta Bread
Atlanta Bread | Main Menu | Sandwiches, Salads, Soups and Coffee
Seasonal
Our commitment to freshness means changing with the seasons and taking advantage of peak produce. Our seasonal offerings are always evolving, offering new flavors for an ever-changing, always delicious experience.
Sandwiches
Sandwiches
Every sandwich is made to order with our daily fresh baked breads. From our timeless classics to changing seasonal options, we put a lot of thought and love into what goes between our famous bread.
All sandwiches are served with kettle chips (150 calories) and a pickle spear (4 calories).
Signature
All signature sandwiches include lettuce, tomato, and red onion and feature our all-natural meat.
Gluten free bread is available upon request.
Chicken Waldorf
760 Calories
chicken, dried cranberries, fresh apples, walnuts, multi-grain cranberry

Gluten free bread is available upon request.

Bowls
Bowls
Fill up and feel good.  Our bowls are made with fresh, seasonal produce for bright flavors and a satisfyingly healthy meal.  Try one for breakfast, lunch or dinner!
Super Med Bowl
618 Calories
Spinach, ancient grains, hummus, cucumber, cherry tomatoes, red onion, Kalamata olives, feta cheese, lemon, olive oil.
Tex-Mex Bowl
723 Calories
chicken, greens, ancient grains, cheese, avocado, roasted black beans and corn, cherry tomatoes, chipotle ranch dressing.
Sunrise Bowls
429–545 Calories
Strawberries, Bananas, homemade granola, coconut, and a honey drizzle
OR
Blueberries, bananas, peanut butter, and almonds both with a choice of Greek yogurt or steel-cut oatmeal.
Southwest Bowl
537 Calories
Roasted potatoes, fluffy scrambled eggs, Pico de Gallo, avocado, shredded cheese, and your choice of breakfast meat.
Power Bowl
431 Calories
Ancient grains, spinach, avocado, roasted mushrooms, tomatoes, feta topped with baked sunny side up eggs
Salads
Salads
We make eating your greens something to get excited about. Our salads are made with fresh, seasonal produce for bright flavors and a satisfyingly healthy meal.
All salads are served with a fresh-baked French baguette (130 calories).
Signature

Please note that not all soups are available at all times.
They are changed seasonally and also vary by location.

The Bakery
If it’s in our bakery case, it was baked today. Our fresh made breads and pastries are great for any occasion from a quiet and delicious morning moment to treating the whole office to breakfast.

Breakfast
Breakfast
They call it the most important meal of the day for a reason. Get your morning started on the right foot with one of our many healthy breakfast options, a fresh baked pastry, or some of the finest coffee around.
Breakfast Sandwiches
Substitute egg whites for an additional charge.
